text.title: Build vs Buy Decision Framework Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the decision-record artefact this methodology produces. Validator in scripts/validate-trade-off-build-vs-buy.py enforces required keys, enum bounds, and pattern constraints.

example.note: All required keys present; enums and patterns satisfied.
Forbidden traits: adr_id pattern violation; decision enum violation; differentiation_score out of [1,5]; negative TCO; empty rejected; review_trigger empty; version + date malformed.
